steps.title: Identify the starting amount
steps.content: At $t=0$, the account has $670$ dollars. In an exponential model, this is the initial value.

steps.title: Find the growth factor
steps.content:
From year $0$ to year $1$, the amount is multiplied by
$$\frac{674.02}{670}=1.006$$
So the annual growth factor is $1.006=1+0.006$.

steps.title: Write the model
steps.content:
Using initial value times growth factor to the power of time gives
$$d=670(1+0.006)^t$$
The answer is B.
